item.dc:creator: aslum

item.title: If a woman approaches you acting like she knows you, there's probably a reason for it, hear her out folks...
item.description: Edit : Someone replied to a comment I made about me saying I know this isn't a woman only thing, telling me to STFU, that I did infer it was just a woman thing... However then they muted me so I couldn't respond.... So for anyone thinking the same... I absolutely know this isn't a woman only problem! I've also shared plenty of posts about men's mh, about men in DV situations ( I've even been called an incel for that!) I share posts, of all kinds, and they all have the best intent... And ones like this, are not jumping on one gender or another! But life is shit, bad things happen and good people want to know how to help, so that's why I shared this, it might help someone! It's not saying it doesn't happen to men, I absolutely know it does and I would never ever say otherwise!...
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: He was eating somebody else’s leftovers but she took them away and brought him fresh food❤️

item.title: A maintenance technician exposes how plastic waste gets in pig feed
item.description:
It's all feed, all the way down.
D: edit- an article about it - take from it what you will, but important to provide further info https://www.fayobserver.com/story/news/2022/05/05/nc-pig-feed-plastics-claim-went-tiktok-viral-does-public-have-worry/6984395001/
item.dc:creator: IAmHandsomeJacksSmirkingRevenge

item.title: Do we worship this kid now or wait until he realizes his powers?
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: On to newer and better things...
item.description: I know this post is attention grabby.. and do i think some of you will care? Not really... but i did want to make a point about the difference of chasing money and chasing a passion. I've managed to transition my nerdy loves into a hobby more worthwhile and soul healing. Plus the difference in communities... I wont cast stones, but the glass community is so loving and helpful. Anyways heres some samples of my finished pieces!!! Tl;dr I had a bad experience in cosplay and started stained glass. And i'm much happier.
item.dc:creator: Kayjora

item.title: Religious persecution
item.description: "The religious persecution of the ages has been carried on under what was claimed to be the command of God. I distrust those people who know so well what God wants them to do, because I notice it always coincides with their own desires" – The History of Woman Suffrage (1902) Volume IV; XVI; page 263 https://www.gutenberg.org/cache/epub/29870/pg29870-images.html Anthony (1820-1906) was a US abolitionist and important women's suffrage activist
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Commissions!
item.description: *UPDATE* Thanks guys for the amazing support! And to all of those who love my art and can’t afford to support me I still really appreciate the love of what I do and what I post. Thanks so much and much love to you all! https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella/commissions Little bit of shameless promo for my commissions! But the end of this month has been a little tight for me. I'm paying a lot in rent atm due to ending my last relationship and taking on a majority of payments, so I could use a bit of extra cash to save for another deposit! Thanks so much!
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Meme Dump 25 out of 200
item.description:
Hii imgur ~ thanks for joining me in another phone cleaning out meme dump
I'm gonna ramble pointlessly throughout the descriptions
Like seriously absolutely pointless
No need to read
Just look at the memes and have a little giggle
Today was a cold cold day where I live
Of course for the past few weeks it's been warm so I turned the temperature down
And I did that thing where you're laying in bed
Freezing
And instead of getting up to grab another blanket
Or turning up the heat
Or grabbing fuzzy socks to stay warm
You just lay there and suffer
Shivering
Hoping that maybe the sleep paralyzes demon
Will turn up the heat for you
I did that today
But just vibing
So all day
I'd do a little work
Complain to myself about freezing
And not do anything about it
Go rest on the couch
Freezing
Complain but of course not turn up the heat
Or put on warmer clothes
Just suffering (:
Why am i like this?
Bet you anything I'll do the same tomorrow
Because it's supposed to be cold too
Anyway that's my cold day rambling story
Anyone go on maniac cleaning sprees where you wash
Everything
Even the walls?
Did that last week when it was warm
Everything is spotless ♡
Expect my life
*finger guns*
Alright idk what else to ramble about soooo see you at the end ♡
Thanks for joining me on another phone cleaning dumparoo adventure ~ happy Wednesday my dudes #memes #funny #memedump
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: Whispering sweet bottom shelf memes into your ear.
item.description:
I do too. How is everyone else saying? It's one of those words that stops being a word after a while
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
https://youtu.be/J5TgAJHkY4k?si=J-y5_pN5oT7K2-NG Here's a fun minute and 30 second clip for ya.
Damn. It's much more elegant than mine.
Now, a look into the shopping algorithm of a bottom shelf meme distributor.
My algorithm has zero idea what to try to sell me.
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka @TheMadOnion @CloacaDeepInADragon @humlyhums @FrothyStout
@SleepyheadNPC
Taxi Bear tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
